name: Attachment Guard
description: Automatically screen incoming mail by attachment file type across all accounts. Match by extension or filename wildcards (*, ?, [0-9]) and move, mark read, delete, or tag-and-warn (banner shown when opened) any message carrying a blocked attachment. Includes trusted-sender exemptions, manual folder scanning, an optional activity log, and an 'Attachment name / extension' condition for Thunderbird's native Message Filters.
author: daviro
